data.name: Sister Wish
data.detailed_description:
Sister Wish - this is classic mahjong solitaire game. Mahjong is a tile-based game, just select pair of 2 similar tiles and clean the table, that`s all needed for win.

Hey, brother welcome to the "Sister Wish". To be step brother of 8 sisters, you should try to be more kind, courteous, polite. Yeah, that`s really hard, I know, what about I told. But in our little city, all differently, from relations to something more than just friends. In this game you can get to know with Alisa, Emmy, Bruna, Mellisa, Stasy, Viky, Judy, Kate. This is 8 sisters have strong relations and your main task to make friends relation with all sisters. Just play mahjong and make it with step sisters. Use your wits, mind.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3/i5/i7/i9
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX960
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
